title: Chart & Manifest Backfill: Documentation
intent: Ensure 05_documentation/ has complete chart.yaml (WAS) and manifest.yaml (WIE) for all shards, contracts, and implementations. Project documentation, ADRs, and specification files.
acceptance_checks: chart.yaml exists and is fully populated in 05_documentation/
manifest.yaml exists and is fully populated in 05_documentation/
All module references resolve to existing paths
All local gates (Policy, SoT, QA) pass
No new files created outside of scope_paths_allow
SoT scorecard shows PASS for all defined rules
